name: Chain of Title → HeirMatrix Writer Agent

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id                       AS scraper_property_id,
  p.parcel_id,
  p.county,
  p.state_code,
  p.address,
  p.current_owners           AS scout_current_owners,
  p.short_legal_raw,
  p.short_legal_parsed,
  p.last_sale_date,
  cc.id                      AS conclusion_id,
  cc.acquisition_type,
  cc.vesting,
  cc.current_owners          AS chain_current_owners,
  cc.vesting_evidence,
  cc.flags                   AS chain_flags,
  cc.verify_status,
  cc.supporting_document_refs,
  s.status                   AS session_status,
  s.stop_reason,
  s.current_phase
FROM properties p
LEFT JOIN chain_conclusions cc
  ON cc.property_id = p.id AND cc.status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT status, stop_reason, current_phase
  FROM investigation_sessions
  WHERE property_id = p.id
  ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
) s ON true
WHERE p.id = {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.scraper_property_id }}

SELECT
  de.id,
  de.document_type,
  de.grantor_names,
  de.grantee_names,
  de.recorded_date,
  de.instrument_date,
  de.book,
  de.page,
  de.instrument_number,
  de.vesting_language,
  de.legal_description_short,
  de.legal_match_to_parcel,
  de.legal_match_method,
  de.legal_match_notes,
  de.extraction_confidence,
  de.conveys_multiple_parcels,
  de.parcels_conveyed_count,
  de.references_prior_deed_book,
  de.references_prior_deed_page,
  de.summary,
  de.flags,
  rc.source_url              AS rod_source_url,
  rc.capture_type
FROM document_extractions de
LEFT JOIN rod_captures rc ON rc.id = de.rod_capture_id
WHERE de.property_id = {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.scraper_property_id }}
ORDER BY de.recorded_date ASC NULLS LAST, de.id ASC

SELECT
  id,
  book,
  page,
  instrument_number,
  recorded_date,
  grantor_raw,
  grantee_raw,
  short_legal_raw,
  verification_status,
  verification_notes
FROM appraiser_transfer_history
WHERE property_id = {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.scraper_property_id }}
ORDER BY recorded_date ASC NULLS LAST, id ASC

parameters.jsCode:
const wb = $('Webhook').first().json.body;
const propRows = $('Load Property & Chain').all();
const extraRows = $('Load Extractions').all();
const xferRows  = $('Load Transfer History').all();

const p  = propRows[0]?.json  || {};
const ex = extraRows.map(r => r.json);
const tx = xferRows.map(r => r.json);

const fmt = v => (v === null || v === undefined ? 'null' : JSON.stringify(v));

const extractionBlock = ex.length === 0
  ? '  (none)'
  : ex.map((e, i) => [
      `  [${i + 1}] id=${e.id}  type=${e.document_type}  confidence=${e.extraction_confidence}`,
      `       date=${e.recorded_date || e.instrument_date || '?'}  book=${e.book || '?'}/page=${e.page || '?'}  instrument=${e.instrument_number || 'N/A'}`,
      `       grantors=${fmt(e.grantor_names)}`,
      `       grantees=${fmt(e.grantee_names)}`,
      `       legal_match=${e.legal_match_to_parcel}  method=${e.legal_match_method}`,
      `       vesting_language=${e.vesting_language || 'N/A'}`,
      `       conveys_multiple=${e.conveys_multiple_parcels}  parcels_count=${e.parcels_conveyed_count}`,
      `       prior_deed=${e.references_prior_deed_book || '?'}/${e.references_prior_deed_page || '?'}`,
      `       summary=${e.summary || 'N/A'}`,
      `       flags=${fmt(e.flags)}`,
    ].join('\n')).join('\n\n');

const transferBlock = tx.length === 0
  ? '  (none)'
  : tx.map((t, i) => [
      `  [${i + 1}] book=${t.book}/${t.page}  date=${t.recorded_date}  instrument=${t.instrument_number || 'N/A'}`,
      `       grantor=${t.grantor_raw}`,
      `       grantee=${t.grantee_raw}`,
      `       verification=${t.verification_status}  notes=${t.verification_notes || 'N/A'}`,
    ].join('\n')).join('\n\n');

const context = [
  '=== PROPERTY ===',
  `  Scraper Property ID : ${p.scraper_property_id}`,
  `  HeirMatrix Prop ID  : ${wb.heirmatrix_property_id}`,
  `  Parcel ID           : ${p.parcel_id}`,
  `  County              : ${p.county}  |  State: ${p.state_code}`,
  `  Address             : ${p.address || 'N/A'}`,
  `  Last Sale Date      : ${p.last_sale_date || 'Unknown'}`,
  `  Scout Owners        : ${fmt(p.scout_current_owners)}`,
  `  Short Legal (parsed): ${p.short_legal_parsed || p.short_legal_raw || 'N/A'}`,
  '',
  '=== CHAIN CONCLUSION ===',
  `  Conclusion ID       : ${p.conclusion_id || 'NONE — no active conclusion'}`,
  `  Acquisition Type    : ${p.acquisition_type || 'unresolved'}`,
  `  Vesting             : ${p.vesting || 'unknown'}`,
  `  Vesting Evidence    : ${fmt(p.vesting_evidence)}`,
  `  Chain Current Owners: ${fmt(p.chain_current_owners)}`,
  `  Chain Flags         : ${fmt(p.chain_flags)}`,
  `  Verify Status       : ${p.verify_status || 'N/A'}`,
  `  Supporting Docs     : ${fmt(p.supporting_document_refs)}`,
  `  Session Status      : ${p.session_status || 'N/A'}  |  Phase: ${p.current_phase || 'N/A'}`,
  `  Stop Reason         : ${p.stop_reason || 'None'}`,
  '',
  `=== DOCUMENT EXTRACTIONS (${ex.length} records) ===`,
  extractionBlock,
  '',
  `=== APPRAISER TRANSFER HISTORY (${tx.length} records) ===`,
  transferBlock,
].join('\n');

return [{
  json: {
    context,
    heirmatrix_property_id: wb.heirmatrix_property_id,
    scraper_property_id:    wb.scraper_property_id,
    county:                 p.county,
    state_code:             p.state_code,
    extraction_count:       ex.length,
    transfer_count:         tx.length,
    has_conclusion:         !!p.conclusion_id,
  }
}];

options.systemMessage:
You are the Chain of Title Writer Agent for HeirMatrix/TitleMatrix. You translate completed chain-of-ownership research from the ScraperSystems Neon database into HeirMatrix title events via the API.

---

## STEP 1 — Check existing events

Call Get Existing Events with the HeirMatrix property ID.
Note which book/page combinations are already written (proof_reference field).
Do NOT create a duplicate — if a matching book/page event already exists, skip it.

---

## STEP 2 — Map each document extraction to an event_type

| ScraperSystems document_type   | HeirMatrix event_type         | Notes                                      |
|-------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| warranty_deed                  | warranty_deed                 |                                            |
| quitclaim                      | quitclaim_deed                |                                            |
| corrective_deed                | deed_transfer                 | Note in description it is corrective       |
| deed_of_distribution           | deed_transfer                 | Note in description it is a dist. deed     |
| deed_of_trust / mortgage       | SKIP                          | Incidental — not in ownership chain        |
| release                        | SKIP                          | Incidental                                 |
| lis_pendens / judgment_lien    | SKIP                          | Incidental                                 |
| affidavit_of_death             | death_intestate               | Or death_testate if will evidence present  |
| estate_order                   | court_order                   |                                            |
| other                          | other                         |                                            |

If acquisition_type = "inheritance_court_only" and there is no deed of distribution extraction, add a death_intestate event inferred from context (status: "pending").

---

## STEP 3 — Set parties

For every event:
- grantor_names array → one party each, direction = "from"
- grantee_names array → one party each, direction = "to"
- Always use person_name_override (not person_id) — use the exact name from the extraction
- Names in grantor_names / grantee_names are JSONB arrays of strings; iterate them

Fractional interests:
- vesting = "sole" → grantee gets interest_numerator=1, interest_denominator=1
- vesting = "tenants_in_common" or "jtwros" → divide equally among grantees (e.g., 2 grantees → each 1/2)
- If vesting_language states a specific fraction (e.g., "an undivided 1/3 interest"), use that exactly
- If unknown → omit numerator/denominator, set interest_description to "unknown — manual review needed"

---

## STEP 4 — Set proof fields and status

proof_reference: "Book {book} / Page {page}"
proof_location: "{County} County Register of Deeds, {State}"

status:
- "confirmed" → extraction_confidence = high or medium AND legal_match_to_parcel = high or medium
- "needs_review" → extraction_confidence = low OR legal_match_to_parcel = low or none
- "pending" → inferred event (no source document in extractions)

---

## STEP 5 — Write description

Write a clear one-sentence description:
Examples:
- "Warranty deed from John A Smith to Mary B Smith, conveying sole ownership."
- "Quitclaim deed from Robert Lee to Robert Lee and Patricia Lee as joint tenants with right of survivorship."
- "Death of Patricia Lee (intestate) — ownership passes under NC Chapter 29."
- "Deed of distribution from Estate of John A Smith to Robert Smith (1/2) and Susan Jones (1/2)."

---

## FINAL REPORT

After all writes, summarize:
- Events created (list each: type, date, book/page)
- Events skipped (reason: duplicate or incidental)
- Gaps or flags (any unresolved ownership, low-confidence extractions, missing deeds)

parameters.toolDescription: Get all existing title events for a HeirMatrix property. Returns an array of events — check their proof_reference field (format: 'Book X / Page Y') to identify which deeds are already written. Call this FIRST before creating anything.

Create one title event in HeirMatrix. Provide the full request body as a JSON string. The body schema: { property_id (int, required), event_type (string, required — one of: deed_transfer, quitclaim_deed, warranty_deed, special_warranty_deed, death_intestate, death_testate, death_survivorship, probate_filing, trust_dissolution, court_order, affidavit_heirship, other), event_date (string YYYY-MM-DD or null), event_date_approximate (bool), description (string, required, max 1000 chars), proof_reference (string or null, format 'Book X / Page Y'), proof_location (string or null, e.g. 'Wake County Register of Deeds, NC'), notes (string or null), status (string: confirmed | pending | needs_review), parties (array of { person_name_override: string, direction: 'from' | 'to', interest_numerator: int or null, interest_denominator: int or null, interest_description: string or null }) }. Call once per deed — do not batch.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.parse($fromAI('request_body', 'Complete request body as a JSON string matching the schema in the tool description.')) }}
